---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.home-hero}

```{=html}
<video
  class="hero-video"
  autoplay
  muted
  loop
  playsinline
  webkit-playsinline
  preload="auto"
  poster="images/home-hero.jpg">
  <source src="images/home-hero.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
```

::: {.home-hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.home-hero-content}

# What does abundance look like around the world?

Join us as we explore food forests, edible landscapes, and the inspiring people creating abundance through plants and food around the world.

::: {.home-hero-buttons}

[Explore Tours](videos.qmd){.hero-button .hero-button-primary}

[▶ Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@thegreenyardaz){.hero-button .hero-button-secondary target="_blank"}

:::

:::

:::

::: {.homepage-placeholder}

## Welcome to The Green Yard

We are rebuilding our website to share food forests, edible landscapes, growing lessons, and stories of abundance from around the world.

More tours and stories are coming soon.

:::
